name: docs_chunks
sample_docs:
# NEXUS OS Discord Bot Invitations

Invite **24 bots** to "The Enterprise" (Guild ID: `1441732155225931869`)

**Already invited:** CEO ✅ | **Remaining:** 24 bots

---

## Instructions

For each link below:
1. Click the link (opens Discord authorization page)
2. Select **"The Enterprise"** from the server dropdown
3. Click **Authorize**
4. Complete CAPTCHA if prompte

### C-Suite (1)

- [ ] **NEXUS COO** (`coo`): [Invite](https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=1470129085014348024&permissions=277025770560&integration_type=0&scope=bot)

sample_docs: To ensure we have captured the full "architectural DNA" from the latest breakthrough session, here is the final distillation of the "Signal" from that specific chat, which now serves as the foundation

Project Evolution: Corrects significant mathematical errors in previous versions (standardizing on 256KB chunks and 50% storage overhead) and pivots from "marketing claims" to "design constraints." 
+
Key Technical Constraints: Mandatory transaction batching (one per file, not per shard) to bypass the 30 tx/s blockchain bottleneck; a 72-hour repair delay window to prevent bandwidth exhaustion from
